title: Polymath AI
description: Zer0pa Polymath AI is research infrastructure for on-device LLM training and multilingual / multi-domain knowledge model construction. It targets on-device runtimes (Snapdragon 8 Elite / QNN / LiteRT) using ELO selective continual pretraining. Outputs are research artifacts: model checkpoints, training telemetry, evaluation reports, and throughput measurements.
